items.claim: Tommy has a high pace and constantly works to get back up when taken down.
items.quote: Tommy was constantly defending the take downs, working right back up, and creating scrambles, and fighting at a super high pace.

items.claim: Alberto Montes has a four-fight win streak.
items.quote: Since then, he's on a four-fight win streak.

items.claim: Tabatha Ricci is very open to getting taken down and controlled.
items.quote: Very small and compact, and very open to getting taken down and controlled.

items.claim: Virna Jandiroba has excellent ability at winning minutes in a decision.
items.quote: she can win a decision if she needs to, and excellent at winning minutes.
No durability, takedown or bust fighter, no grit.

items.claim: Chase Hooper struggles to defend takedowns.
items.quote: He can shoot takedowns, but get easily stuffed.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has poor defensive wrestling and get-up game.
items.quote: CLD's wrestling defensively needs some work and get up game.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is very open to getting taken down.
items.quote: you would think that DDP would be able to defend those type of takedowns, but he is very open to getting taken down.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman has not fought in over a year.
items.quote: Usman hasn't fought in over a year.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is susceptible to being put on the back foot.
items.quote: If you pressure Usman and put him on the back foot, you can have success.
